functions.name: getLastExceptionStack
functions.description: Returns the last exception stack as a string. Useful for debugging.

functions.name: isNotNull
functions.description: Returns true if v is not null and not NaN.

functions.name: getDefault
functions.description: Returns v if not null or NaN, otherwise returns defaultValue.

functions.name: getDefaultFloat
functions.description: Like getDefault but specifically for Std.parseFloat results.

functions.name: positiveModulo
functions.description: Modulo operator but always returns a positive result.

functions.name: positiveModuloInt
functions.description: Integer version of positiveModulo.

functions.name: parseJson
functions.description: Parses a JSON file from an asset path.

functions.name: parseJsonString
functions.description: Parses a raw JSON string.

functions.name: deleteFolder
functions.description: Recursively deletes a folder and all its contents.

functions.name: safeSaveFile
functions.description: Saves a file safely, creating missing folders and showing a warning box on error.

functions.name: addMissingFolders
functions.description: Creates any missing folders along the given path.

functions.name: isNaN
functions.description: Returns true if the value is a Float and is NaN.

functions.name: first
functions.description: Returns the first element of an array.

functions.name: last
functions.description: Returns the last element of an array.

functions.name: setFieldDefault
functions.description: Sets a field's default value if it doesn't exist, and returns the value.

functions.name: addZeros
functions.description: Pads a string with leading zeros until it reaches the given length.

functions.name: addEndZeros
functions.description: Pads a string with trailing zeros until it reaches the given length.

functions.name: getSizeString
functions.description: Converts a byte size into a human-readable string like '2.03 GB'.

functions.name: getSizeString64
functions.description: Like getSizeString but uses Float64 on cpp targets.

functions.name: removeIP
functions.description: Replaces any IP addresses in a string with '[Your IP]'.

functions.name: fpsLerp
functions.description: Framerate-independent lerp. Use this instead of FlxMath.lerp in update loops.

functions.name: lerpColor
functions.description: Lerps between two colors. Automatically adjusts for FPS unless fpsSensitive is true.

functions.name: getFPSRatio
functions.description: Adjusts a lerp ratio to be framerate-independent.

functions.name: getColorFromDynamic
functions.description: Tries to parse a FlxColor from a Dynamic value (Int, Float, String, or Array).

functions.name: playMenuSong
functions.description: Plays the main menu theme if not already playing.

functions.name: preloadCharacter
functions.description: Preloads a character's XML and frames.

functions.name: playMusic
functions.description: Plays music and resets the Conductor. Reads BPM and loop info from an INI if available.

functions.name: playMenuSFX
functions.description: Plays a menu sound effect by type (SCROLL, CONFIRM, CANCEL, etc).

functions.name: coolTextFile
functions.description: Reads a text file and returns non-empty, non-comment lines as an array.

functions.name: numberArray
functions.description: Returns an array of integers from min to max.

functions.name: switchAnimFrames
functions.description: Swaps the frames of two FlxAnimations.

functions.name: swapAnims
functions.description: Swaps two animations on an animation controller by name.

functions.name: setUnstretchedGraphicSize
functions.description: Resizes a sprite to fit within given dimensions without stretching.

functions.name: setGraphicSizeFloat
functions.description: Like setGraphicSize but accepts floats.

functions.name: setSpriteSize
functions.description: Sets a sprite's scale to match the given pixel dimensions and updates the hitbox.

functions.name: keyToString
functions.description: Returns a display string for a FlxKey (e.g. LEFT → '←', ESCAPE → 'ESC').

functions.name: cameraCenter
functions.description: Centers an object within a camera's bounds.

functions.name: getAtt
functions.description: Gets an XML attribute safely without throwing on missing attributes.

functions.name: autoSetFormat
functions.description: Applies an array of TextFormats to a FlxText.

functions.name: loadAnimatedGraphic
functions.description: Loads a spritesheet and adds an auto-playing idle animation.

functions.name: copyColorTransform
functions.description: Copies all color transform values from color2 into color1.

functions.name: resetSprite
functions.description: Fully resets a sprite: position, alpha, velocity, tweens, etc.

functions.name: getMacroAbstractClass
functions.description: Gets the macro class created by hscript-improved for an abstract or enum.

functions.name: indexOfFromLast
functions.description: Like indexOf but searches from the end. Returns -1 if not found.

functions.name: clear
functions.description: Clears all elements from an array.

functions.name: pushGroup
functions.description: Pushes multiple elements into an array at once.

functions.name: openURL
functions.description: Opens a URL in the system browser.

functions.name: browsePath
functions.description: Opens a folder in the OS file explorer.

functions.name: timeToStr
functions.description: Converts a millisecond timestamp to mm:ss.ms format.

functions.name: replay
functions.description: Stops a sound and plays it again from the beginning.

functions.name: maxInt
functions.description: Returns the larger of two integers without Float conversion.

functions.name: minInt
functions.description: Returns the smaller of two integers without Float conversion.

functions.name: floorInt
functions.description: Floor division without Int->Float->Int conversion.

functions.name: quantize
functions.description: Quantizes a value to a precision. e.g. quantize(2.5543, 100) = 2.55.

functions.name: setMusic
functions.description: Sets a SoundFrontEnd's music to a FlxSound safely.

functions.name: flxeaseFromString
functions.description: Gets a FlxEase function from a string name.

functions.name: getFilename
functions.description: Returns the filename from a path without the extension.

functions.name: getClosestAngle
functions.description: Returns the closest angle to targetAngle from angle, wrapping around 360.

functions.name: worldToScreenPosition
functions.description: Converts a world position to screen position accounting for camera zoom.

functions.name: pointToScreenPosition
functions.description: Like worldToScreenPosition but for a FlxPoint.

functions.name: mouseOverlaps
functions.description: Returns true if the mouse is overlapping the sprite on the given camera.

functions.name: sortAlphabetically
functions.description: Sorts a string array alphabetically.

functions.name: pushOnce
functions.description: Pushes an element only if it doesn't already exist in the array.

functions.name: repeat
functions.description: Repeats a string a given number of times.

functions.name: bound
functions.description: Clamps a Float between Min and Max.

functions.name: boundInt
functions.description: Clamps an Int between Min and Max.

functions.name: boolToInt
functions.description: Converts a Bool to 1 or 0.

functions.name: parseNumberRange
functions.description: Converts a string like '1..3,5,7..9' into an array of numbers.

functions.name: formatNumberRange
functions.description: Converts an array of numbers into a range string like '1..3,5,7..9'.

functions.name: deepFlatten
functions.description: Recursively flattens a nested array.

functions.name: getLuminance
functions.description: Returns the luminance of a color as a value between 0 and 1.

functions.name: deepEqual
functions.description: Deep equality check supporting arrays, maps, enums, and primitives.

functions.name: isMapEmpty
functions.description: Returns true if the map has no entries.

functions.name: parsePropertyString
functions.description: Parses a field path string like 'obj.field[0]' into components.

functions.name: parseProperty
functions.description: Traverses an object by field path and returns a PropertyInfo.

functions.name: cloneProperty
functions.description: Copies a property value from one object to another by field path.
